supplemental_note.why_not_available: Chainlink Labs has never published a binding, time-stamped vesting or unlock schedule for the ~362M reserve tokens. On-chain movements from the reserve wallet can be tracked (Etherscan: 0x98C63b7B319dFBDF3d811530F2ab9DfD7E2b9E9E and related multisigs), but without a disclosed schedule the forward rate cannot be projected. A rough trailing-12-month observed rate could be estimated by comparing CoinGecko circulating supply snapshots, but CoinGecko's free API historical granularity and the irregular nature of reserve releases make this estimate unreliable (±2–4 pp error). Messari's detailed unlock data requires a paid subscription.

supplemental_observed_estimate.note: Best-effort observed estimate only — NOT a disclosed or scheduled rate
supplemental_observed_estimate.caveat: Releases are discretionary; forward rate could be materially higher or lower. No public vesting schedule exists. Use with extreme caution.
